title: fraxinus excelsior var. nana
intro: Fraxinus excelsior var. nana, also known as the dwarf ash, is a compact and slow-growing variety of the common ash tree (Fraxinus excelsior). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The dwarf ash is said to offer various health benefits, such as supporting cardiovascular health, reducing stress and anxiety, and acting as an antispasmodic to alleviate muscle cramps and spasms. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the dwarf ash are typically used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to treat a range of health issues.
